title: Wasm type confusion due to wrong reachability analysis in `WasmGCTypeAnalyzer::ProcessBranchOnTarget()` with custom descriptor casts
bounty_rationale: High-quality report with demonstration of RCE in a sandboxed process
description_snippet:
### VULNERABILITY DETAILS

#### Summary

Wasm type confusion due to wrong reachability analysis on `WasmGCTypeAnalyzer::ProcessBranchOnTarget()` with descriptor checks. Analyzer wrongly assumes that same-type casts always succeed, although with custom descriptors exactly matching casts might still f
